brands.name: Bunny Hive, The
brands.notes: Social studio ('social club') franchise for babies/young children and their caregivers, founded 2019 and franchising since 2023. Very young but fast-growing emerging system; brand locations page lists studios (open and coming soon) in 13 states.

riskFlags.title: Very new, unproven franchise system
riskFlags.detail: Began franchising in 2023; only 17 units reported by Entrepreneur in 2026. Limited operating history as a franchisor despite rapid percentage growth (+1,600% off a tiny base).

riskFlags.title: No exclusive territories
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur's directory listing reports exclusive territories are not available to franchisees.

riskFlags.title: Investment range differs between sources
riskFlags.detail: Franchisor's own franchise page states $143,410-$398,050 total investment, while Entrepreneur lists $126,610-$330,850; figures here headline the franchisor's current numbers.
riskFlags.source: The Bunny Hive franchise page / Entrepreneur

statesOpen.note: Huntsville; per brand locations page, may include coming-soon studios
La Jolla, Mountain View; per brand locations page, may include coming-soon studios
Delray Beach, Jacksonville, Odessa, Tampa; per brand locations page
Athens, Atlanta, Peachtree City, Roswell, Savannah, Smyrna; per brand locations page
Baltimore, Bethesda; per brand locations page
Bergen County, Haddonfield, Hoboken, Fort Monmouth; per brand locations page
Charlotte, Raleigh; per brand locations page
Charleston, Greenville; per brand locations page
Chattanooga, Knoxville, Nashville; per brand locations page
Austin, Houston; per brand locations page

franchiseFee.source: The Bunny Hive franchise page (confirmed by Entrepreneur)

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor's current stated range $143,410-$398,050; Entrepreneur lists $126,610-$330,850

totalInvestmentMax.note: Varies by market, studio size, lease vs. buy

royaltyPercent.source: The Bunny Hive franchise page (confirmed by Entrepreneur)
royaltyPercent.note: 7% of studio gross revenue, monthly; ad/marketing fee charged as flat $115+/week per Entrepreneur, not a percentage

totalUnits.note: Entrepreneur 2026 count; brand locations page lists 31 studios including coming-soon

fddAvailable.note: FDD provided electronically; brand discloses franchise-registration-state compliance

isGrowing.note: +1,600% unit growth off a small base; ranked #97 in Entrepreneur's 2026 Top New & Emerging Franchises

brands.name: Children's Art Classes
brands.notes: Fine-art education studios for kids (CAC Franchising LLC, Jacksonville FL); curriculum dates to 1997 founder Barbara Gay, franchising since 2020. Source data conflicts on founding year and unit count (Entrepreneur: 36 units; vettedbiz FDD summary: 14; brand site lists locations in 20+ states).

riskFlags.title: Modest per-unit revenue vs. investment (long payback)
riskFlags.detail: FDD-derived average yearly gross sales of ~$118,240 against a $134,268-$264,110 investment; FranchisePayback estimates an 11-13 year payback period for an owner-operator.

riskFlags.title: Conflicting founding-year and unit-count data across sources
riskFlags.detail: Brand site says established 1997; Entrepreneur lists founded 2009 with 36 units (2026); Vetted Biz FDD summary lists 14 U.S. locations. Likely reflects pre-franchise corporate history vs. franchised-entity data.

statesOpen.note: HQ state (Jacksonville); per brand locations listing

franchiseFee.source: Entrepreneur Franchise 500 directory (matches Vetted Biz FDD summary)

totalInvestmentMin.source: Entrepreneur Franchise 500 directory (matches Vetted Biz FDD summary)

totalInvestmentMax.source: Entrepreneur Franchise 500 directory (matches Vetted Biz FDD summary)

royaltyPercent.note: Vetted Biz lists 8% of gross; Entrepreneur lists 8.25%

liquidCapitalMin.note: Vetted Biz lists $35,000 minimum cash; net worth requirement $250,000 per Entrepreneur

avgUnitRevenue.note: Average yearly gross sales per unit from FDD Item 19 performance representations across a small system; not a profit figure

totalUnits.note: Entrepreneur 2026; Vetted Biz FDD summary lists 14 U.S. locations and brand site claims 50+ class locations

yearFounded.note: Brand states established 1997 by founder Barbara Gay; Entrepreneur lists 2009 for the company entity

trainingWeeks.note: 54 hours classroom + 42 hours on-the-job, held at Jacksonville FL headquarters

item19Available.note: Item 19 gross-sales representation summarized by Vetted Biz

exclusiveTerritories.note: Territory protection tied to development/sales quotas

isGrowing.note: +350% unit growth reported since franchising began in 2020; ranked in Entrepreneur Franchise 500 for 2026

brands.name: Cleanest Restaurant Group
brands.notes: Home-based, B2B restaurant-cleaning franchise (NYC-based; family cleaning operation roots to 1974), founded 2017 and franchising since 2022 with national restaurant-chain account relationships. Small, young system with an Item 19 in its FDD.

riskFlags.title: Very new, small franchise system
riskFlags.detail: Franchising only since 2022 with ~15 units (Entrepreneur 2026; Vetted Biz lists 11). Headline growth percentages are off a tiny base and the franchised model has a short track record.

riskFlags.title: Website sales figure far exceeds FDD-derived franchisee average
riskFlags.detail: Franchise website promotes 'Average Annual Sales: $6.5M', which reflects the founder's corporate operation, while Vetted Biz's Item 19-derived average yearly gross sales for units is ~$161,568. Prospects should rely on the FDD Item 19, not the headline number.
riskFlags.source: crgfranchise.com vs. Vetted Biz FDD summary

riskFlags.title: Investment range differs between sources
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur lists $102,686-$144,174 total investment; Vetted Biz's FDD summary lists $115,950-$242,000.

franchiseFee.source: Entrepreneur Franchise 500 directory (matches Vetted Biz FDD summary)
franchiseFee.note: Standard territory fee; 10% veteran discount available

totalInvestmentMin.note: Entrepreneur range $102,686-$144,174; Vetted Biz FDD summary shows $115,950-$242,000

totalInvestmentMax.note: Vetted Biz FDD summary shows a higher max of $242,000

avgUnitRevenue.note: Average yearly gross sales per franchise unit derived from FDD disclosures across a very small system; not profit. Website's $6.5M figure is the corporate operation, not franchisee performance

yearFounded.note: Built on a family cleaning business dating to 1974

trainingWeeks.note: Two-week program at corporate HQ; Entrepreneur details 32 hours on-the-job + 13 hours classroom

item19Available.source: crgfranchise.com (references Item 19 financial performance history in FDD)

exclusiveTerritories.note: Large metro/suburban protected territories per franchisor

isGrowing.note: +1,400% growth reported off a very small base since 2022

brands.name: Combo Brands
brands.notes: Multi-brand 'combo' franchise platform (Miami-based, founded 2020) letting franchisees run up to three complementary service or food businesses in one location to share rent and payroll; related to the Combo Kitchen restaurant system. Not currently offered in 14 franchise-registration states per its own website.

riskFlags.title: Franchised from day one; unproven multi-brand model
riskFlags.detail: Founded and began franchising in the same year (2020), so there was no corporate-unit track record before selling franchises, and the shared-roof multi-brand model is novel.

riskFlags.title: Sister system shows large sold-vs-open gap
riskFlags.detail: Related Combo Kitchen system was publicized as selling 200+ franchises in under two years, but Vetted Biz's FDD summary shows only ~12 operating U.S. locations — a pattern worth scrutinizing in Combo Brands' own FDD Item 20.

riskFlags.title: Not offered in franchise-registration states
riskFlags.detail: Combo Brands' website states franchises are not available in CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, or WI — indicating it has not registered its FDD in those states.

franchiseFee.note: Range $25,000-$35,000 depending on brands/configuration; one fee covers multi-brand location

totalInvestmentMin.note: Entrepreneur range $27,750-$353,000; other FDD summaries cite $49,000 low end. Varies widely by brand mix and real estate

royaltyPercent.note: Sliding scale: 7% on annual sales to $500K, 7.5% to $1M, 8% above $1M — 7% is the standard starting tier

liquidCapitalMin.note: Net worth requirement also listed at $32,000

multiUnitAvailable.source: combobrands.com (model is inherently multi-brand/multi-business per location)
multiUnitAvailable.note: Up to three businesses under one roof per franchise

isGrowing.note: +130.9% unit growth reported; verify open-vs-sold in FDD Item 20

brands.name: DryerVentz - DuctVentz - WindowZ
brands.notes: Home-based, van-based vent/duct/window cleaning franchise ('3 businesses in 1': DryerVentz, DuctVentz, WindowZ + SolarClear), founded 2018 and franchising since 2020. Tiny system (~11 territories) with flat recent unit growth and aggressive non-Item-19 earnings claims on its website.

riskFlags.title: Flat unit growth in a tiny system
riskFlags.detail: Entrepreneur's 2026 listing shows 11 units with a 0.0% growth rate, and Vetted Biz's FDD summary lists only 6 U.S. locations — signs the system has stalled at a very small size.

riskFlags.title: Earnings claims on franchisor website are not FDD Item 19 figures
riskFlags.detail: Franchise site advertises 'Avg. Monthly Revenue: $30,000 Per Van' and 'Avg. Net Profit: 55% Per Van' without published Item 19 substantiation; no independent FDD-derived revenue figure was found. Treat these as marketing claims.

riskFlags.title: Conflicting basic data across sources
riskFlags.detail: Founded year (2018 per Entrepreneur vs. 2020 per Vetted Biz), franchise fee ($25,000 vs. $24,000), liquid capital ($100,000 per Entrepreneur vs. $50,000 per franchisor) and investment ranges vary by source.

nationwide.note: Franchisor states it is 'currently offering franchises in 48 states' — availability claim only; actual operating territories reported in roughly 6 states

totalInvestmentMin.note: Franchisor and Entrepreneur list $40,000-$75,000; Vetted Biz FDD summary $37,300-$80,750

royaltyPercent.note: Sliding scale from 8% down to 5% of gross revenue as volume grows; 8% is the standard starting rate

liquidCapitalMin.note: Franchisor lists $50K liquid / $100K net worth; Entrepreneur lists $100K liquid

totalUnits.note: Franchise territories; Vetted Biz lists 6 U.S. locations

isGrowing.note: 0.0% unit growth rate reported in 2026 listing
